answer.question: What breaks if source.ecom.raw_orders changes?
answer.answer: If source.ecom.raw_orders changes, it will break model.stg_orders directly, as the staging model reads from this source. The downstream impact propagates to several dependent models: model.customers, model.order_items, model.orders, and the SQL files for these marts and staging models.

citations.description: dbt_model in models/staging/stg_orders.sql reads source.ecom.raw_orders and writes model.stg_orders for dataset `source.ecom.raw_orders`
